allow: PowerShell($gh = "C:\\Program Files\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe"; if \(Test-Path $gh\) { "found: $gh"; & $gh --version } else { "not at default path"; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)","$env:LOCALAPPDATA" -Recurse -Filter gh.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 3 -ExpandProperty FullName })
